LanguageData.VHGE_CommandToggleGas_Desc: Designate propane flow to be toggled on or off. A colonist will come soon to flick the switch.
LanguageData.VHGE_GasOverlayTooltip: Toggle the infinite propane pocket overlay
LanguageData.VHGE_InfiniteDeposit: A small infinite propane deposit has been found!
LanguageData.VHGE_NeedDeepOrGeyser: Propane pumps must be placed on a propane pocket or gas geyser.
